To achieve automatic firing, the trigger system must be modified to eliminate this reset mechanism. This can be done by installing a full-auto trigger group or modifying the existing trigger to bypass the reset function.

In semi-automatic weapons, the sear is designed to catch and hold the firing pin after each shot, preventing continuous firing.
